cut_point_evaluation.control_region_debug_summary:
An index-ordering issue is present: ordered opposite-flavour counts are asymmetric even when physical wrong-flavour categories survive.
baseline control preselection: ordered opposite-flavour counts are one-sided ((11,13)=1095059.000, (13,11)=0.000) while the physical wrong-flavour regions remain populated. This is consistent with fixed ntuple lepton ordering.

notes: dsigma_isolation_pb is the maximum absolute sigma shift relative to the nominal FIXED_ISO point over the configured diagnostic scan region.
The isolation scan is used to quantify residual dependence, not to select an optimal cut.
dsigma_isolation_pb is the maximum absolute sigma shift relative to the nominal FIXED_ISO point over the configured diagnostic scan region.
The isolation scan is used to quantify residual dependence, not to select an optimal cut.
Isolation dependence is reported relative to the fixed nominal working point.
A plateau is not required for the scan to be usable as a dependence study.

scan_diagnostics_summary:
Isolation scan diagnostics quantify residual dependence around the fixed nominal isolation working point.
The scan is diagnostic/systematic input only; it does not choose the final cut.
Scan mode: local_box
Evaluated DD methods: none, wrong_flavour, wrong_charge, both_average
Scan points with defined sigma values: 25/25

Sigma ranges across the diagnostic region:
none: sigma in [2193.809520, 2204.621896] pb, |Δsigma| in [0.000000, 9.258791] pb, fractional |Δsigma| in [0.000000, 0.004203]
wrong_flavour: sigma in [2190.907270, 2201.160964] pb, |Δsigma| in [0.000000, 8.808177] pb, fractional |Δsigma| in [0.000000, 0.004004]
wrong_charge: sigma in [2169.911740, 2180.196593] pb, |Δsigma| in [0.000000, 8.809726] pb, fractional |Δsigma| in [0.000000, 0.004044]
both_average: sigma in [2180.409505, 2190.678779] pb, |Δsigma| in [0.000000, 8.808952] pb, fractional |Δsigma| in [0.000000, 0.004024]

Monotonicity and plateau summary:

fixed_axis       classification  count

no clear plateau was seen in the scanned region

Local stability near the nominal point:
none: nearest point at (ptcone=3.500, etcone=9.250) gives Δsigma=-1.746053 pb, |Δsigma|=1.746053 pb, fractional |Δsigma|=0.000793.
wrong_flavour: nearest point at (ptcone=3.500, etcone=9.250) gives Δsigma=-1.511781 pb, |Δsigma|=1.511781 pb, fractional |Δsigma|=0.000687.
